title: mentha × villosa var. speciosa
intro: Mentha × villosa var. speciosa, also known as variegated pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is characterized by its distinct variegated or mottled leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. speciosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
